seoTitle: Findon vs Finniss — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Findon and Finniss. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Findon and Finniss.
heading: Findon vs Finniss — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Findon, South Australia and Finniss, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Finniss has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Findon (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Findon or Finniss safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Findon has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Finniss scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Findon scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Finniss scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Findon or Finniss?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Finniss has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
